name: The Fool
text: Freedom from conventions and norms. Something or someone unique and exceptional. Options kept open. Giving up control. Spontaneity. Uncertainty. Attention to the here and now. Going on a trip.
Difficulty choosing or committing. Restlessness. Lack of purpose. Getting lost. Foolish behavior. Eccentricity. Lack of acceptance. Difficulty in planning ahead.

name: I - The Magician
text: The start of something. Beginner’s luck. Tools and means at one's disposal. Supernatural forces. Creation. Training and acquisition of practical skills. Improvisation. Display or show for others.
Trickery. Sleight of hand. Cheating. Showing off. Pretending. Lack of self-awareness. Inexperience.

name: II - The High Priestess
text: Intellect and intuition. A spiritual mother. Hidden strength. Modesty. Secrets. Something hidden. Mystery. Getting a hint of something which remains largely unknown. Indefinite answers.
Hiding one's true nature. Inability to communicate clearly. Conservative approach to sex and the body. Emotional blockage.

name: III - The Empress
text: Abundance. Growth. Productivity. Natural or human influences. Emotional intelligence. Protection and care. Motherhood. A powerful female figure. Strong feminine identity.
Impulsive behavior. Someone difficult to reason with. Overprotectiveness. Excessive involvement in the lives of others. Problems with a strong mother figure.

name: IV - The Emperor
text: Practical and material achievements. Matters relating to the workplace or source of income. Authority. Control. A commanding position. A protective father figure. A patron or sponsor. Assertiveness. Military affairs.
Belligerence. Violence. Brute force. Dictatorship. Abuse. Difficulty in coping with a dominant father figure. Denial and hiding of inner weaknesses.

name: V - The Herophant
text: Teacher, instructor, or counselor. Education and knowledge, academic expertise. Organized religion, conventional medicine or psychology. Spiritual father. Consultation or treatment by a specialist. Marriage.
Excessive adhesion to conventions and outdated norms. Bureaucracy, an oppressive establishment. Hypocrisy, discrimination. Divorce.

name: VI - The Lovers
text: Love, amorous relationship. Emotional entanglement. Need to make a choice, or to disengage oneself from past influences. Inclinations of the heart correspond to the will of heaven. Small steps actually taken are the visible signs of inner desire.
A Complex relationship between several people. Hesitation. Quandary. Confusion as to one’s own feeling and will.

name: VII - The Chariot
text: Victory or an achievement leading to a strong and protected position. Ambition. Energy. Motivation to move forward. Public honor. Power and high status.
Inner weakness hidden behind external bravado. Arrogance. Vanity. Over-protectiveness. Emotional closure. Confusion about one’s goals. Losing one's touch with people and reality.

name: VIII - Justice
text: Law and order. Legal and court issues. A fair and balanced judgment. A developed conscience. Rationality. Reasoning by clear rules and common norms. Grace and humanity beyond objective considerations.
Guilt. A critical and judgemental attitude. Petty accountability. Repressive control of oneself and others. Negative ideas blocking change and advance.

name: IX - The Hermit
text: A quest for truth or spiritual understanding. Concentrating on a clear purpose. Caution. Careful examination. Self-privation for the sake of a meaningful cause. Loyalty to principles, strong faith.
A closed and reclusive attitude. Isolation. Loneliness. Fixed ideas. Excessive caution and suspicion. A critical approach looking for defects. Hidden and denied desires.

name: X - The Wheel of Fortune
text: Change in circumstances and position. A rise after a fall. Gambling. Putting faith in capricious luck. Life cycles, closure of circles. Adapting to the routine of everyday life. A hint to previous incarnations.
A decline after success. Danger lurking at the summit. Moving in a closed circle. Capricious mood changes. Feeling powerless to affect one’s situation.

name: XI - Force
text: Power and courage to face challenges. Controlled expression of creative urges, drives and desires. Mobilization of inner resources towards a common goal. Taking risks.
Need to keep things under control. Constant tensions. A risk of losing one’s grip. Internal conflicts and unrealistic assessment of one’s own forces may lead to failure.

name: XII - The Hanged Man
text: Seeing things from a unique point of view. Enduring difficulties for a worthy cause. A period of deep self examination. Passivity, acceptance of reality even if it is the opposite of what one expects.
Isolation. Emotional stance of a victim. Inability to act. Denying one’s own unique qualities, striving to be “normal” at all costs. Living in one’s private and imaginary reality.

name: XIII - Death
text: The end of something whose time has come. Cutting off past influences or attachment to dominant figures. Giving up the superfluous and keeping only the essential. Disintegration of the old makes room for the new.

Difficulty in coping with loss or change. Temporary challenges. Disintegration. Realization of a painful truth. Does not predict future death, but may reflect anxiety about dying or mourning over a loss which has already happened.

name: XIV - Temperance
text: Reconciliation, compromise, relaxation of tensions. Integration of opposites. Ability to do the seemingly impossible. A slow process of distillation and improvement. Patience, perseverance. Self-improvement.
Going back and forth without making real progress. Losing patience with a lengthy process. Emotional preoccupation with oneself, pushing away others who might come to help.

name: XV - The Devil
text: A burst of creativity. Paradoxes and contradictions. Irony and mocking of common norms. Acting from desires, passions and impulses. Moving on from a past family trauma.

Temptation. Attraction to the dark and forbidden. Exploitation. Egotism. Dmination. Compulsive self-gratification. Difficulty in detaching oneself from an unhealthy bond. Senseless behavior has its price.

name: XVI - The Tower
text: Breaking up solid structures. Getting free from confinement. Sudden breakthrough after long preparations. Sparkling sexual encounter. Success lies in simplicity and modesty.

Shock. Collapse of projects or trusted structures. A fall from an apparently solid and secure position. Chaos. Confusion. Difficulty in understanding what is going on. Vanity and pride lead to failure.

name: XVII - The Star
text: Openness, simplicity, return to nature. Purity, honesty. Showing yourself “as you are,” accepting one’s body and desires. Generosity. Luck from heaven. Intuitive feeling of guidance or energy coming from a higher plane.
Naive optimism. Wishful thinking. Exposing oneself to danger or abuse. Difficulty in setting proper boundaries. Squandering, wastefulness.

name: XVIII - The Moon
text: Deep emotions, perhaps related to a mother or feminine figure. A different experience of reality. Longing for the unreachable. Finding one’s hidden strengths. Occupation with the remote past. A hidden treasure.
Vague and disturbing feelings. Emotional difficulties, a period of depression. Danger lurking under the surface. Retreat. The road ahead is hard to find.

name: XIX - The Sun
text: Light and warmth, abundance, blessings. Pleasant feeling, emotional or physical healing. Partnership, trust, sharing, brotherhood. Human touch. An ideal father figure. Matters relating to children. Setting limits in a moderate and non-oppressive way.
Living in a limited space. A stuggle to face reality. Immaturity. Dependence on others. Someone or something too intense and energetic to feel comfortable with. An absent father.

name: XX - Judgement
text: Revelation, enlightenment, a new understanding. A turning point in a therapy process. Healing of a family relationship. Disclosure, secrets revealed, publicity. Birth of a baby or of a new thing.
Revelation of something that should have been kept hidden. Lack of privacy. Unpleasant realization. Problems related to child-parent relations. Too much noise and drama.

name: XXI - The World
text: Completion of a process. Balanced activity and achievements in various domains. Contact with far places. Harmony and correspondence between different planes. Pregnancy, something new is about to be born. The Dance of Life.
Life in a bubble. Difficulty in sharing your world with others. Disconnection of inner feelings from external life. Preoccupation with oneself. Idealized self-image. Inability to move forward.

name: Ace of Coins
text: A good start in material things. Financial and physical stability. A practical perspective. A significant sum of money. Utilitarian approach.
Greed. Something basic and unsophisticated. Dismissal of higher ideals.

name: 2 of Coins
text: Duality. Mirror images. Collaborating while keeping distance. A forking path.
A doppelganger. Superficial similarity. Inability to distinguish between alternatives.

name: 3 of Coins
text: Production. A partnership or an alliance bears fruit. First results of a project. Good prospects.
Disappointment. Failure of a partnership or project.

name: 4 of Coins
text: Stability. Reliability. Solid material assets. Tradition, reputation and honor. Established social institutions.
Conservatism. Outdated structures. Clinging to old patterns.

name: 5 of Coins
text: Destabilization. Something new appears and disrupts existing structures. Finding success with something new.
Crisis. Destruction of existing structures. New ideas meet resistance.

name: 6 of Coins
text: Expansion. Abundance of resources and possible ways to advance. A positive outlook, success. A good balance between stability and movement.
Overwhelming speed. Things getting out of control. Too much of a good thing.

name: 7 of Coins
text: Acceptance. Help and protection. Integrating into a system without losing one’s individuality
Lack of independence. Being reliant on help from others.

name: 8 of Coins
text: Uniformity. A mechanical structure. Efficiency. Routine work. A slow and patient advance.
Proceduralism. Unrewarded excellence. Falling behind. Dragging down or being dragged down by others.

name: 9 of Coins
text: Ambition. Motivation. Carving a niche for oneself. Independent thinking leads to success.
Ruthlessness. Taking advantage of or displacing others. A challenger appearing.

name: 10 of Coins
text: Abundance. Intensive activity. Material success and achievements. Shared prosperity.
An inequitable windfall. Jealousy of others. Lack of reward for one's work.

name: Page of Coins
text: A practical endeavor. Untapped potentials are within reach. Tangible success at the beginning. A solid material base for further advancement.
Hesitation. Lack of clear purpose. Missed opportunities. Preoccupation with the past.

name: Knight of Coins
text: Advancement in a practical direction. A productive expression of creativity. A clear goal in sight.
Constant pursuit of money. Lack of material stability. Passions and desires that interfere with practical plans.

name: Queen of Coins
text: Tangible assets. Material and personal stability. A sober and realistic vision. Looking at things from a practical and pragmatic perspective.
Conservatism, resistance to change, aiming only to preserve the existing assets. Looking at things only from the material perspective.

name: King of Coins
text: Confidence. Security. A cautious but optimistic vision. Looking for new achievements while holding existing assets secure.
Dissatisfaction with what one already has. Disregard of the good things in the present situation. A limited outlook.

name: Ace of Cups
text: The beginning of a love relationship. Expression of warm feelings. Romantic longing for something extraordinary. Emotional and spiritual growth.
Emotional dryness, feeling oneself empty. Avoidance of intimacy, negative feelings, heartbreak.

name: 2 of Cups
text: Partnership. A romantic relationship or a close personal alliance. Interpersonal dynamics based on social norms. Passion in love.
A crisis between partners. Disappointment with someone close to you. Problems caused by passion.

name: 3 of Cups
text: Birth. Something new brings joy and happiness. Caring for a child. Issues of child-parent relationships. A common project motivated by feelings and not only by interests.
Problems in relationships with parents or children. A strong alliance of two persons leaves a third one outside.

name: 4 of Cups
text: Family. A collective of people with a history and a sense of belonging. Commitment to a group, at the price of giving up personal interests.
Problems and discord in the family or in a long-lasting community. A fixed social structure which doesn’t allow for adaptation or flexibility.

name: 5 of Cups
text: Popularity. Relations with many people. Becoming the center of attention in a group. Relying on connections with other people.
Excessive preoccupation with social activity. Losing oneself in multiple superficial connections. Superficial relationships.

name: 6 of Cups
text: Continuity. A long-term relationship. Repetition between different generations in the family. A stable personal alliance.
Monotony. Tedious repetition. Falling into old emotional traps.

name: 7 of Cups
text: Individuality. A single person finding his place in a group. Contact with people in high positions. Exceptional qualities are appreciated.
Estrangement. Being alone in a crowd. Problems integrating into a group.

name: 8 of Cups
text: Involvement. Developing personal relationships within a group. A favorable human-relations environment. A feast or a family event.
Interference in one's relationships. Familial pressure.

name: 9 of Cups
text: Harmony. A group or organization working collectively. Everyone finding their proper place. Accepting one’s role in a social environment. Wishes coming true.
A confusing social situation. Difficulty situating oneself in a complex environment.

name: 10 of Cups
text: Leadership. Special qualities being recognized. Assuming responsibility for others. Maintaining a superior position.
A fallen leader. Loss of popularity. Ingratitude.

name: Page of Cups
text: First and unsure steps in a romantic endeavor. Shyness. Sincere intentions. Trying to figure out one’s feelings.
Over-absorption in one’s feelings. Losing contact with others. Sloppiness in practical affairs.

name: Knight of Cups
text: A romantic gesture, offering one’s heart, courting. Openness, sincerity, a simple heart. A potential lover may appear.
Superficial and unstable feelings. An over-optimistic but unrealistic attitude. An overt display of shallow or insincere feelings.

name: Queen of Cups
text: A rich inner world which is kept hidden. Guarding one’s privacy or valuable assets. Strong feelings held under control.
Closure. Defensiveness. Distrust of others due to past experience. Sublimating one's emotions.

name: King of Cups
text: Emotional maturity, optimism, ability to overcome past injuries and look ahead. Openness to new things, but with prudence and caution. Closing one’s ear to voices from the past.
Difficulty overcoming an emotional blow. Pessimism arising from past experience.

name: Ace of Wands
text: Creative momentum. Active sexuality. Strong impulses, energy and drive. Life force. Beginning of growth. Dispersing one’s efforts in different directions.
Lack of energy. Restriction. Repressed sexuality. A creative block.

name: 2 of Wands
text: Crossroads. Several options or ways to choose from. Every course offers benefits. A brief encounter with someone going his own way. Blocking an opponent’s advance.
No clear solution. Makig the best of a bad situation. Insufficient information to make a choice.

name: 3 of Wands
text: Direction. Moving forward. Finding a middle path between two courses of action. Gaining an advantage by keeping neutrality.
Wild thrashing. Ill-considered choices. A compromise that pleases nobody.

name: 4 of Wands
text: Stalemate. A temporary stop in order to prepare. Good prospects in the long run. Waiting for the situation to develop.
Helplessness. Inability to make the first move. Being forced into passivity.

name: 5 of Wands
text: Overcoming. Getting over a weak opposition. Breakdown of an equilibrium. Focusing on the main objective. An initiative to make a winning move.
An overwhelmingly complex situation. Losing one’s edge.

name: 6 of Wands
text: Collaboration. A strong alliance of common insterest. A taste for luxury made possible by favorable conditions.
Enemies allied against you. Excessive pursuit of luxury. Being set up to take a fall.

name: 7 of Wands
text: Struggle. Endurance. Putting up a fight against many opponents. Keeping one's convictions. A difficult combat with an uncertain outcome.
Obstinacy. Fighting a losing battle. Beset by enemies.

name: 8 of Wands
text: Regulation. Following rules. Concrete tasks. Focus on short-term goals.
A roadblock. Losing long-term perspectives. Stalled progress. Minutiae.

name: 9 of Wands
text: Interruption. Letting go of one’s projects to resolve conflict. Starting anew after a challenging period.
The failure of plans. Difficulties and oppositions too hard to overcome.

name: 10 of Wands
text: Loyalty. A partnership or an alliance. Perseverance. Honoring one’s principles in spite of difficulties.
Dilemmas. Problems arising from principles. Being pulled in multiple directions.

name: Page of Wands
text: A creative potential which still needs processing. Keeping a safe distance from events and waiting for the right moment.
An overwhelming task. Difficulty controlling desires and urges. Immature sexuality.

name: Knight of Wands
text: A change of direction, following one’s urges and passions. A temporary stop, but there is still energy and a desire to advance.
Succumbing to tempatation. Preoccupation with satisfaction of one’s own desires. Problems in defining long-term goals.

name: Queen of Wands
text: A feminine figure with a strong personality. Things connected with food and eating. Speaking softly while holding a big stick. A secure and well-defended position.
Intimidation. Menace. Sexuality as a means of control. Problems with a maternal figure. Fear of feminine power.

name: King of Wands
text: A mature attitude to urges and desires. Controlled creativity. Prodding oneself to make a move forward. Investing present assets in future projects.
Self-defeat. Frustrated plans. Hesitation. Conflict. Tendency to make things too heavy and complex.

name: Ace of Swords
text: A planned initiative. Rational and logical thinking, sharpness of mind. A conclusive decision. Readiness to fight. Ambition, competitiveness. A victory with stable achievements.
Negative and unproductive thoughts. Misconceptions. Delusions. Self-defeat. Injury.

name: 2 of Swords
text: Boundaries. Limits that protect and define something which is in development. Making full use of the present situation. Preparations for future advancement. A clear view encompassing the overall situation.
Constraints. Being held back. External limtations that prevent growth or preparation.

name: 3 of Swords
text: Victory. Overcoming a weak opposition. Cutting through a quandary and going forward in a clear direction. A third party intervenes and wins over two weakened opponents.
A failure. Defeat from a weaker opponent. An unsuccessful attempt to make a decisive move.

name: 4 of Swords
text: Restriction. A limited space for development and maneuver. Trying to push against constraints. Potentials to grow once the present limitations become less solid.
Confinement. Being blocked. Lack of motivation or energy to break out of a limited situation.

name: 5 of Swords
text: Breakthrough. A forward thrust overcoming the existing limits. Keeping up spirits in a tight situation. Doing things in one’s own way.
A failed initiative to change the situation. Stubbornness leading nowhere. Oppressing factors that cannot be removed.

name: 6 of Swords
text: Adaptation. Accepting limitations and adapting oneself to them. Respecting the present order. Compromising in order to make the best of the existing situation.
Resignation. Surrender. Giving up the ambition to change things for the better. Lack of fighting spirit.

name: 7 of Swords
text: Sharpness. A focused and determined attitude. Concentrating on a clear goal and doing what it takes to reach it. Winning a fight with the odds evenly balanced.
Narrow and over-concentrated vision. Investing one’s efforts and resources in a lost cause.

name: 8 of Swords
text: Defenses. Putting up shields and blocks. Psychological defense mechanisms. A need to be in total control. A well-guarded treasure. Entering another’s domain with permission.
Exclusion. Distrust. Obstacales to communication and collaboration. Others asserting control over you.

name: 9 of Swords
text: Courage. Winning a fight against a superior force. Pure intentions. Putting imperfect means to good use.
Losing against a stronger opponent. Sloppiness, imperfect preparations for a challenge.

name: 10 of Swords
text: Exhaustion. A complex situation with many conflicting interests. A long battle without a clear outcome. Need to find an ally who will attack the problem from a different direction.
Immobility. Impossible to move now. Feeling attacked from different sides. A painful and humiliating defeat.

name: Page of Swords
text: Preparation for a future challenge. Looking for a compromise between reason and strong desires. Hesitating to use one’s power.
Confusion, negative and inhibiting thoughts, self-defeat. Sloppy use of one’s own tools may cause damage.

name: Knight of Swords
text: Energy and resources to advance, still looking for the right direction. Hovering above practical constraints. Determination and perseverance.
Trying to force one’s misguided views, insisting on a wrong direction. Losing touch with the ground.

name: Queen of Swords
text: A secure and protected position. Defending one’s territory. Preparation of something that shouldn’t be exposed yet.
Defensiveness and rigidity. Suspicion and fixed ideas block advancement and preclude new connections.

name: King of Swords
text: A determination to break from the past, a strong will. Feeling equipped to deal with uncertainty. Wisdom and intellectual maturity.
A divided heart, a need to cut off from something to which one is still attached. Over-calculating in a vain attempt to overcome uncertainty.
